title: sorbus velutina
intro: Sorbus velutina, also known as the Velvet Rowan or Korean Mountain Ash, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family Rosaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Sorbus velutina include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Sorbus velutina include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to make medicine, but more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
